debug_info.goal:
a : Type
x : a
xs : List a
ih : xs = fromRA (Chapter3.toRA a xs)
t : Tree a
ds : List (Digit a)
⊢ x :: (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) (Digit.one t :: ds) =
    (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm)
      (consRA.consT (Tree.leaf x) (List.foldr consRA nilRA ((concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) (Digit.one t :: ds))))

failed_attempts: induction ds generalizing t <;> simp_all [toRA, fromRA, fromRA.frm, fromTree, consRA, consRA.consT, concat1]

have h t ds : fromRA (consRA.consT t ds) = fromRA.frm (Digit.one t) ++ fromRA ds := by
        induction ds generalizing t <;> simp [fromRA, consRA.consT, fromRA.frm, fromTree, concatMap, *, List.append_assoc]
      simp [ih, h, fromRA.frm, fromTree]

have h t ds : fromRA (consRA.consT t ds) = fromRA (Digit.one t :: ds) := by
        induction ds generalizing t with
        | nil => rfl
        | cons d ds ih' => cases d <;> simp [consRA.consT, fromRA, fromRA.frm, concat1, List.map, ih', fromTree, List.append_assoc]
      simp [h, ← ih]

induction ds generalizing t with
      | nil => simp [consRA.consT, fromRA.frm, concat1, List.map, List.foldr, ih, *]
      | cons d ds ih_ds => cases d <;> simp [consRA.consT, fromRA.frm, concat1, List.map, List.foldr, ih_ds, List.append_assoc, ih, *]
simp_all [toRA, fromRA, consRA, consRA.consT, fromRA.frm, fromTree, concat1, concatMap]

have h (t : Tree a) (ds : List (Digit a)) :
        (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) (consRA.consT t ds) = fromRA.frm (Digit.one t) ++ (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) ds := by
        induction ds generalizing t with
        | nil => rfl
        | cons d ds' ih' => cases d <;> simp [fromRA.frm, consRA.consT, Tree.leaf, Tree.node, concat1, List.map, ih', *]
      simp [h, ← ih]

have h t ds : (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) (consRA.consT t ds) = (fromRA.frm (Digit.one t)) ++ (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) ds := by
        induction ds generalizing t with
        | nil => rfl
        | cons d ds ih' => cases d <;> simp [consRA.consT, fromRA.frm, concat1, ih', List.append_assoc]
      simp [h, ← ih, fromRA.frm, concat1, List.append_assoc]

have h (t : Tree a) (ds : List (Digit a)) : (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) (consRA.consT t ds) = fromRA.frm (Digit.one t) ++ (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) ds := by
        induction ds generalizing t with
        | nil => rfl
        | cons d ds ih => cases d <;> simp [consRA.consT, fromRA.frm, List.append_assoc, ih]
      simp [h, fromRA.frm, ← ih]

induction ds generalizing t x with
      | nil => simp [consRA.consT, fromRA.frm, fromTree, concat1, List.map, Function.comp, ih]
      | cons d ds ih' => cases d <;> simp [consRA.consT, fromRA.frm, fromTree, concat1, List.map, Function.comp, ih', List.append_assoc, ih]
simp_all [← ih, toRA, consRA.consT, fromRA.frm, concat1]
